UX.name: User Experience
evidence: PPVProgressPanel: 7 real stages with live status (pending/active/complete/failed)
Each stage shows: icon, label, duration (Xs), animated dots when active, checkmark when complete
Progress bar: real percentage based on completed stages, color-coded (purple→green→red)
Failure state: red indicator, error message shown per-stage
enginesUsed badges shown in result panel after completion
Pollo output: <VideoPlayer> renders when videoUrl is set, polls every 8s
Build memory issue fixed permanently: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 in package.json
deductions: -1.0: PPVProgressPanel polls ppvBundleProgress but bundleId is generated client-side before mutation — server generates its own bundleId, so progress store may not match until server confirms bundleId
